violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee observed without proper hair restraint. -2 staff on cook line have beards but are not wearing beard nets.

Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed using same pair of single-use gloves for more than one task. -Cook placed raw burger patty on cook top and then got bun out of bag and placed it onto cook top with out a glove change/hand wash. *Redirected immediately.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil * was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Rust/wear at bottom shelf of meat prep table. -Crock pot base is warped and dented.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Limescale/yellow debris at bottom edge of interior panel of ice machine.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Crumb debris at bottom interior of 2 door freezer. -Dried food debris at underside of shelf near knife magnets on right side of prep table. -Dust/debris at bear walk in cooler.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Leak at faucet of kitchen 3 compartment sink (currently slowed with cloth tied around faucet).
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Appropriate procedures0/2, C COOKING POTENTIALLY HAZARDOUS FOOD 14 Cooking and reheating to the proper time and temperature (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
